languages.text: "Отрадно видеть, Ваша Светлость, что вы действительно способны понять рекомендации моего коллеги и аргументированно возразить".
"It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."
languages.original_text: "Отрадно видеть, Ваша Светлость, что вы действительно способны понять рекомендации моего коллеги и аргументированно возразить".

traits.locale_text: "It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."
"It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."
"It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."

languages.text: «Me congratula constatar, mi{mf|lord|lady}, que es usted capaz de entender las observaciones de mi colega y presentar a su vez un contraargumento bien razonado».
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."

traits.locale_text: «Me congratula constatar, mi{mf|lord|lady}, que es usted capaz de entender las observaciones de mi colega y presentar a su vez un contraargumento bien razonado».

languages.text: “看到您确实能够理解我同僚的建议，并能给出有理有据的反驳，实在是令我欣慰，大人。”
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."

traits.locale_text: “看到您确实能够理解我同僚的建议，并能给出有理有据的反驳，实在是令我欣慰，大人。”

languages.text: « Votre Seigneurie, il est gratifiant de voir que vous êtes capable de comprendre les recommandations de mon collègue, et même de répondre avec un contre-argument raisonnable. »
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."

traits.locale_text: « Votre Seigneurie, il est gratifiant de voir que vous êtes capable de comprendre les recommandations de mon collègue, et même de répondre avec un contre-argument raisonnable. »

languages.text: "Meslektaşımın tavsiyelerini gerçekten anlayabildiğinizi ve mantıklı bir karşı argüman sunabildiğinizi görmek memnuniyet verici {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."

traits.locale_text: "Meslektaşımın tavsiyelerini gerçekten anlayabildiğinizi ve mantıklı bir karşı argüman sunabildiğinizi görmek memnuniyet verici {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: 「{mf|閣下|閣下}が我が同僚の助言を実際に理解し、筋の通った反論を組み立てられるとは、喜ばしい限りです」
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."

traits.locale_text: 「{mf|閣下|閣下}が我が同僚の助言を実際に理解し、筋の通った反論を組み立てられるとは、喜ばしい限りです」

languages.text: "Es ist erfreulich, zu sehen, dass Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} tatsächlich in der Lage sind, die Empfehlungen meines Kollegen zu verstehen und ein vernünftiges Gegenargument vorzubringen."
languages.original_text: "It is gratifying to see, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, that you are actually able to understand my colleague's recommendations and make a reasoned counter-argument."

traits.locale_text: "Es ist erfreulich, zu sehen, dass Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft} tatsächlich in der Lage sind, die Empfehlungen meines Kollegen zu verstehen und ein vernünftiges Gegenargument vorzubringen."
